title: Gujarat Vidyapith Jobs 2026 - Apply Online for 28 Assistant Professor Posts
description: The Gujarat Vidyapith has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 28 Assistant Professor Posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their Post-graduation, Ph.D., B.E./B. Tech, M.E./M. Tech, MCA can apply for the Gujarat Vidyapith Jobs 2026 . The interested applicants can apply in online mode. Here we have mentioned the education details, age limit, selecti...
